_comment: Curated corrections to CLDR weekend data (Intl.Locale.getWeekInfo). Day numbers are ISO-8601: 1=Mon .. 7=Sun. CLDR is the base source; these entries override countries where CLDR is outdated or wrong. This curated layer is maintained by Qiniso. Each entry cites its reason.

BD.reason: Bangladesh's official weekly holiday is Friday & Saturday; CLDR still reports Sat/Sun.

NP.reason: Nepal observes a single weekly day off (Saturday); CLDR reports Sat/Sun.
